general_provisions: This bill establishes minimum safety standards for seclusion rooms in schools.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>establishes minimum physical standards for seclusion rooms including room size, ceiling height, construction materials, and structural integrity requirements;<hr><ltbullet>requires proper lighting with fixtures located outside the room and controls that prevent student access;<hr><ltbullet>mandates adequate ventilation, heating, and cooling systems comparable to other school rooms;<hr><ltbullet>sets safety requirements including prohibition of dangerous objects, unbreakable windows, and specific door and locking mechanism standards;<hr><ltbullet>requires audio and video recording equipment that records all activities during seclusion;<hr><ltbullet>ensures compliance with federal and state student privacy laws;<hr><ltbullet>ensures compliance with state and local fire and building codes;<hr><ltbullet>applies standards to both existing seclusion rooms and any new school construction that includes seclusion rooms;<hr><ltbullet>gives the State Board of Education authority to adopt additional rules for safety standards, compliance verification, and  program administration;<hr><ltbullet>integrates the new standards into existing policy, documentation, and enforcement requirements; and<hr><ltbullet>makes conforming changes.
